_comment: Expected checker outcome per test PDF (see tests/README.md).
ok:       expected overall verdict (true = zero findings).
findings: exact multiset of [level, rule] pairs the checker must
report -- used where the outcome is fully pinned down.
must:     [level, rule] pairs that must be present -- used for the
bad-* cases where a trick may trip additional checks.

cases.name: good-unmodified-template
cases.purpose: the official USENIX template, verbatim (placeholder author block included)

cases.name: good-baseline
cases.purpose: fully compliant short paper

cases.name: good-full-length
cases.purpose: compliant paper using the full 13-page body budget

cases.name: good-body-at-limit
cases.purpose: boundary: end-matter begins at the top of page 14 (body = exactly 13 pages)

cases.name: bad-body-onto-page14
cases.purpose: boundary: body spills a little onto page 14 before the end-matter

cases.name: good-wide-figure
cases.purpose: compliant paper with a full-width figure and a table

cases.name: bad-missing-appendices
cases.purpose: appendices absent (Open Science required, ethics recommended)

cases.name: warn-one-column
cases.purpose: single-column layout

cases.name: bad-metadata-author
cases.purpose: author name left in PDF metadata

cases.name: warn-author-names
cases.purpose: author block still names authors, affiliation, e-mail

cases.name: good-dense-table
cases.purpose: a dense body-size table is not read as squeezed body leading

cases.name: good-paragraph-labels
cases.purpose: run-in bold \paragraph/\textbf labels are not squeezed headings

cases.name: good-author-empty
cases.purpose: an empty author block is allowed; front matter still reserves its space

cases.name: warn-overfull-line
cases.purpose: honest overfull \texttt line pokes a few pt into the margin

cases.name: bad-a4-paper
cases.purpose: A4 instead of U.S. letter

cases.name: bad-small-font
cases.purpose: 9 pt body text

cases.name: bad-linespread
cases.purpose: \linespread{0.94} leading compression

cases.name: bad-savetrees
cases.purpose: the savetrees package (forbidden by the CFP)

cases.name: bad-titlesec
cases.purpose: titlesec-compressed section spacing (forbidden by the CFP)

cases.name: bad-title-space
cases.purpose: \maketitle whitespace below the title trimmed with \vspace

cases.name: bad-tall-block
cases.purpose: \textheight enlarged to 9.4 inches

cases.name: warn-wide-table
cases.purpose: one over-wide table (a few lines outside the block): warning, not error

cases.name: warn-graphics-bleed
cases.purpose: a figure drawn wider than the block bleeds into the margin: warning

cases.name: bad-wide-block
cases.purpose: \textwidth enlarged ~0.5": text overflows most pages (systematic): error

cases.name: bad-body-too-long
cases.purpose: main body ends past page 13

cases.name: bad-squeeze-untouched
cases.purpose: squeeze deck: untouched template (unfilled placeholder author block, no Open Science appendix)

cases.name: bad-squeeze-authors-removed
cases.purpose: squeeze deck: author block removed, title/front-matter space trimmed

cases.name: bad-squeeze-savetrees-moderate
cases.purpose: squeeze deck: moderate savetrees compresses leading

cases.name: bad-squeeze-savetrees-extreme
cases.purpose: squeeze deck: extreme savetrees crams everything onto one page

cases.name: bad-squeeze-title-space
cases.purpose: squeeze deck: title pushed above the block (a few lines: warning)

cases.name: bad-squeeze-titlesec
cases.purpose: squeeze deck: titlesec-compressed section spacing
